 Numeric value that can hold a float, signed or unsigned 32-bit integer. More...

 Range specification defined by a minimum, maximum and type. More...

static void spec_print (const spec_t *spec, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
 Print a spec_t range to an output using the provided print function.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Defines the num_type_t union for holding numeric boundary values and the spec_t structure that specifies valid ranges for media controls.

Function Documentation

◆ spec_print()

static void spec_print ( const spec_t * spec,
int(* print_func )(const char *,...),
const char * indent )
static
Parameters
[in]specPointer to the range specification to print.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.
[in]indentPrefix string prepended to each output line.
